ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_years" (
  "financial_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial data */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial year */,
  "fiscal_year_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the fiscal year */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the financial year is the current one */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the financial year (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_units" (
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business unit */,
  "business_unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the business unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business unit */,
  "parent_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent business unit */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the business unit operates */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email for contacting the business unit */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the business unit (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., revenue growth rate, market share growth rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metric */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the metric */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "financial_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data point */,
  "financial_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial year the data belongs to */,
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business unit the data belongs to */,
  "num_records" INTEGER /* Number of records for the financial year */,
  "cumulative_records" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of records */,
  "w1" REAL /* W1 value */,
  "w2" REAL /* W2 value */,
  "rgr" REAL /* Revenue growth rate (RGR) */,
  "dt" REAL /* Market share growth rate (Dt) */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric the data belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Actual value of the financial metric */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the financial metric */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance from the target value */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date when the data was generated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_financial_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_year_id") REFERENCES financial_years ("financial_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_business_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("business_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, business unit manager, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user is active */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "financial_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the access was successful */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_financial_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("financial_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "financial_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., year-end, quarterly) */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_financial_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("financial_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report recipient */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being sent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the report */,
  "recipient_email" TEXT /* Email address of the report recipient */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recipient (e.g., pending, sent) */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the report was sent */,
  "sent_by" TEXT /* User who sent the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_recipients_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_recipients_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_unit_metrics" (
  "business_unit_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business unit metric */,
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business unit the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the metric */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value for the metric */,
  "financial_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial year the metric belongs to */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date when the metric was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the metric (e.g., target, actual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_unit_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_unit_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_unit_metrics_business_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("business_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_unit_metrics_financial_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_year_id") REFERENCES financial_years ("financial_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric the threshold belongs to */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action to take when the threshold is breached */,
  "financial_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial year the threshold belongs to */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the threshold was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the threshold */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the threshold (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_thresholds_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_thresholds_financial_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_year_id") REFERENCES financial_years ("financial_year_id")
)
